# Let me map the remaining positions more efficiently

# Move to (top, center) and click
result = action(['UP'])
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 48}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nAfter (top, center) + click blue:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    min_r, max_r = min(rows), max(rows)
    min_c, max_c = min(cols), max(cols)
    if max_c < 30 and n['pixels'] > 4 and n['color'] != 'g':
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, "
              f"bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}]")

# Now let me check all blocks to understand the full layout
print("\nAll blocks:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    min_r, max_r = min(rows), max(rows)
    min_c, max_c = min(cols), max(cols)
    if max_c < 30 and n['pixels'] > 4:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, "
              f"bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}]")

# Print the layout
print("\nLayout:")
for i in range(18, 44):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][6:28]
    has_content = any(c in row_str for c in 'RbN Y')
    if has_content:
        print(f"  Row {i}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

              f"bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}]")

# Print the layout
print("\nLayout:")
for i in range(18, 44):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][6:28]
    has_content = any(c in row_str for c in 'RbN Y')
    if has_content:
        print(f"  Row {i}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
